values.content:
You are a senior HR specialist and talent acquisition expert. Analyze the candidate resume against the job description with objectivity and honesty. Return ONLY valid JSON — no markdown, no backticks, no explanation text outside the JSON.

Position: {{ $json.position }}
Company: {{ $json.company }}

JOB DESCRIPTION:
{{ $json.job_description }}

CANDIDATE RESUME:
{{ $json.resume_text }}

Return EXACTLY this JSON structure (all fields required, no extra keys):
{
  "overall_score": <integer 1-10>,
  "recommendation": "<Strong Hire|Hire|Maybe|Reject>",
  "match_percentage": <integer 0-100>,
  "summary": "<2-3 sentence honest candidate assessment>",
  "key_strengths": ["<strength1>", "<strength2>", "<strength3>"],
  "skill_gaps": ["<gap1>", "<gap2>"],
  "red_flags": ["<flag1>"],
  "years_of_experience": "<e.g. 4-6 years in field>",
  "education_fit": "<Strong|Good|Partial|Missing>",
  "culture_fit_score": <integer 1-10>,
  "interview_questions": ["<specific question 1>", "<specific question 2>", "<specific question 3>"],
  "estimated_salary": "<e.g. $70,000 - $90,000/year>",
  "standout_factor": "<single most notable thing about this candidate in one sentence>",
  "next_action": "<Phone Screen|Technical Interview|Panel Interview|Reject|On Hold>"
}

parameters.subject: 🌟 Top Candidate: {{ $json.candidate_name }} — {{ $json.position }} (AI Score: {{ $json.overall_score }}/10)
parameters.message:
🌟 Top Candidate Screened by AI

Automated screening via n8n · {{ $json.screened_at }}

Candidate{{ $json.candidate_name }}
{{ $json.candidate_email }}
Position{{ $json.position }} @ {{ $json.company }}
AI Score{{ $json.overall_score }}/10  {{ $json.match_percentage }}% match to JD
Recommendation{{ $json.recommendation }}
Next Action{{ $json.next_action }}
Summary{{ $json.summary }}
Key Strengths{{ $json.key_strengths }}
Skill Gaps{{ $json.skill_gaps }}
Red Flags{{ $json.red_flags || 'None detected' }}
Experience{{ $json.years_of_experience }} | Education: {{ $json.education_fit }}
Culture Fit{{ $json.culture_fit_score }}/10
Interview Questions{{ $json.interview_questions }}
Est. Salary{{ $json.estimated_salary }}
Standout Factor{{ $json.standout_factor }}

Auto-screened by n8n AI HR Screener — Day 16 of 30-Day Automation Challenge

parameters.responseBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  success: true,
  candidate: $json.candidate_name,
  email: $json.candidate_email,
  position: $json.position,
  overall_score: $json.overall_score,
  match_percentage: $json.match_percentage,
  recommendation: $json.recommendation,
  next_action: $json.next_action,
  summary: $json.summary,
  key_strengths: $json.key_strengths.split(', '),
  skill_gaps: $json.skill_gaps.split(', '),
  red_flags: $json.red_flags ? $json.red_flags.split(', ') : [],
  years_of_experience: $json.years_of_experience,
  education_fit: $json.education_fit,
  culture_fit_score: $json.culture_fit_score,
  interview_questions: $json.interview_questions.split(' | '),
  estimated_salary: $json.estimated_salary,
  standout_factor: $json.standout_factor,
  screened_at: $json.screened_at
}, null, 2) }}
{"success": false, "error": "Missing required fields: resume_text and job_description are both required", "required": ["resume_text", "job_description"]}

setup_instructions: 1. Import this JSON into n8n (Settings → Import workflow)
2. Set your OpenAI API credential on the 'AI Resume Analyzer' node
3. Set your Google Sheets OAuth2 credential + replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEETS_ID with your sheet's ID
4. Set your Gmail OAuth2 credential on 'Gmail – Notify HR' node
5. Set your Slack OAuth on 'Slack – Top Candidate Alert' node (optional)
6. Activate the workflow — webhook URL appears on the Webhook node
8. Payload: { candidate_name, candidate_email, resume_text, job_description, position, company, hr_email }

sample_payload.job_description: We are hiring a Senior PM with 5+ years experience in SaaS, strong data skills, and experience leading cross-functional teams...
sample_payload.resume_text: Jane Smith | Product Manager | 6 years experience | Led 3 product launches at Series B startup | SQL, Mixpanel, Figma | MBA from NYU...
